title: Book Reviews
abstract: Books reviewed in this article: Bauman, Zygmunt Liquid Modernity Bauman, Zygmunt The Individualized Society Bauman, Zygmunt Community: Seeking Safety in an Insecure World Britt, David. W. 1997 A Conceptual Introduction to Modelling: Qualitative and Quantitative Perspectives Castles, Stephen Ethnicity and Globalization: From Migrant Worker to Transnational Citizen Greskovits, Béla, The Political Economy of Protest and Patience: East European and Latin American Transformations Compared Hechter, Michael, Containing Nationalism Millward, Neil, Bryson, Alex and Forth, John All Change At Work? British Employment Relations 1980–1998, As Portrayed By the Workplace Industrial Relations Survey Series Poggi, Gianfranco Durkheim
